name: OnSecurityLocalPDUValidated
title: OnSecurityLocalPDUValidated
syntax: void OnSecurityLocalPDUValidated(char pduName[], dword dataId, byte payload[], dword payloadLength, qword authInfoHigh, qword authInfo, dword authInfoBitLength, qword freshness, dword freshnessBitLength, dword freshnessValueId, dword verificationResult)
description: This callback handler is called, when a node received a secured PDU and verified the authentication information.
Apart from the verification result, all values which have been used for verification can be analyzed.

parameters.name: dword dataId
parameters.description: The data ID of the PDU.

parameters.name: dword payloadLength
parameters.description: The payload length of the PDU in bytes.

parameters.name: qword authInfoHigh
parameters.description: Upper 64 bits of the authenticator (MAC), if authenticator is larger than 64 bits.Otherwise 0;

parameters.name: qword authInfo
parameters.description: The full authenticator value or the lower 64 bits of the authenticator (MAC), if authenticator is larger than 64 bits.

parameters.name: dword authInfoBitLength
parameters.description: Length of complete received authenticator ( length of authInfo if the authenticator is <= 64 bit, otherwise length of authInfo + authInfoHigh)

parameters.name: dword freshnessBitLength
parameters.description: The freshness value length in bits.

parameters.name: dword freshnessValueId
parameters.description: The freshness value ID of the PDU.

parameters.name: dword verificationResult
parameters.description: 1: Verification successful, PDU is valid 0: Verification failed, PDU is invalid

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
